label: FAIL
rationale: MBRControl is set with Enable true, Done true, and MBRDoneOnReset containing PowerCycle. After that reset, the sources say Done is set false; with Enable true and Done false, MBR shadowing is active, so an LBA 0 read must be fulfilled from the MBR table rather than returning the prior user-media pattern AA.

label: PASS
rationale: MBRControl is set with Enable true, Done true, and an empty MBRDoneOnReset set. The sources say an empty set shall not change Done on any reset, so after PowerCycle Done remains true; because MBR shadowing is active only when Enable is true and Done is false, returning the prior user data AA at LBA 0 is protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: MBRControl is set with Enable true, Done false, and an empty MBRDoneOnReset set. Since the empty set means PowerCycle does not change Done, Done remains false; with Enable true and Done false, MBR shadowing is active and an LBA 0 read must return MBR table values rather than the prior user-media pattern AA.
